title: X-Men #50
keyDetails: Second appearance of Polaris. Steranko cover. Origin of the Beast.
presentation: High-grade example with strong color and premium shelf presence.

title: X-Men #55
keyDetails: Barry Windsor-Smith artwork and classic Silver Age X-Men appeal.

title: X-Men #101
keyDetails: Origin and first appearance of Phoenix.

title: X-Men #4
